name: FetchNodeDbInfo
description: Information about a fetched node in the FetchDB.

url.description: The URL of the fetched node.

status.description: The HTTP status code of the fetch.

numOfOutlinks.description: The number of outgoing links discovered.

items.description: A child (outlink) of a fetched node.

childUrl.description: The URL of the child node.

anchorText.description: The anchor text of the link.

children.description: The outgoing links from this node.
